about.title: About SIARA
about.lead: SIARA is a road safety intelligence platform combining live reporting, mapping, and AI insights to improve incident response.
about.missionText: Reduce road risk with fast, evidence-based incident coordination.
about.visionText: Build connected, AI-supported urban safety systems for smarter mobility.
about.approachText: Combine citizen signals, geospatial context, and operational analytics in one workflow.
about.riskMappingText: Identify hotspots and incident density zones in real time.
about.alertIntelText: Prioritize high-impact events using severity and reliability indicators.
about.responseCoordText: Support faster field decisions with one shared operational view.
about.performanceText: Measure verification and response outcomes to improve continuously.

overview.title: SIARA Workflow Overview
overview.lead: SIARA provides a clear operational pipeline from report intake to validated alert delivery.
overview.step1Text: Capture reports with location, media, and contextual metadata.
overview.step2Text: Normalize and verify incoming records for analysis readiness.
overview.step3Text: Estimate urgency and confidence using AI-assisted scoring.
overview.step4Text: Authorized teams validate incidents and assign response priorities.
overview.step5Text: Deliver relevant alerts to users and operational stakeholders.
overview.techStackText: AI risk scoring, geospatial mapping, real-time events, and verification workflow.

travelHistoryDetailModal.noSegmentData: No segment data was captured for this trip.

drivingQuiz.title: Driver Profile Assessment
drivingQuiz.subtitle: Answer questions, then we send scores to model service

errors.modelExplanationFailed: Could not get live model explanation
errors.streamFailed: Live explanation stream failed. Please retry.

attention.title: Attention & Focus
attention.q1: How often do you find your mind wandering away from driving while you're behind the wheel?
attention.q2: How often do you realize you missed something on the road because you weren't fully paying attention?

anxiety.title: Driving Anxiety
anxiety.q3: How often do you feel nervous or tense when driving, even in normal traffic?
anxiety.q4: How often do you worry about getting into a crash while you're driving?

risk-taking.title: Risk Taking
risk-taking.q5: How often do you take chances while driving, like overtaking when it's a bit risky?
risk-taking.q6: How often do you feel comfortable driving faster than others when the road is clear?
risk-taking.q7: How often do you push yourself to drive in situations you know are a bit dangerous (like on narrow or busy roads)?

anger.title: Anger & Aggression
anger.q8: How often do you feel angry or furious at other drivers when they annoy you?
anger.q9: How often do you get frustrated and drive more aggressively after being cut off?
anger.q10: How often do you shout at other drivers or make rude gestures at them?

sensation.title: Sensation Seeking
sensation.q11: How often do you drive much faster than the speed limit for the thrill of it?
sensation.q12: How often do you feel excited when driving at very high speeds on open roads?

stress-relief.title: Stress Relief
stress-relief.q13: How often do you drive to relax or reduce stress?
stress-relief.q14: How often do you take a drive just to clear your mind or calm down?
stress-relief.q15: How often do you feel less stressed after a long drive?

patience.title: Patience & Calmness
patience.q16: How often do you stay calm and patient even when you're stuck in a traffic jam?
patience.q17: How often do you keep your cool when other drivers are slow or make mistakes?

safety.title: Safety Consciousness
safety.q18: How often do you drive carefully to avoid accidents?
safety.q19: How often do you follow all traffic rules (speed limits, signals, etc.) because safety is important to you?
safety.q20: How often do you pay extra attention to the road and surroundings to avoid mistakes?

violations.title: Traffic Violations
violations.q21: How often do you exceed the speed limit when driving?
violations.q22: How often do you tailgate (follow too closely) the vehicle in front of you?
violations.q23: How often do you overtake another vehicle by briefly driving in the oncoming lane?
violations.q24: How often do you drive through a red light or fail to fully stop at a stop sign?
violations.q25: How often do you use your mobile phone (text or call) while driving?
violations.q26: How often do you get angry at other drivers and express it by shouting or honking?

errors.title: Driving Errors
errors.q27: How often do you misjudge the distance or speed of another vehicle when overtaking or merging?
errors.q28: How often do you accidentally press the gas pedal when you meant to hit the brake (or vice versa)?
errors.q29: How often do you fail to notice a traffic sign or signal until it's too late?
errors.q30: How often do you overlook a pedestrian or cyclist when making a turn?
errors.q31: How often do you have to brake suddenly because you only just noticed something you missed?

lapses.title: Memory Lapses
lapses.q32: How often do you find yourself driving on "autopilot," arriving at your destination without remembering parts of the trip?
lapses.q33: How often do you miss your exit or turn because you were distracted or daydreaming?
lapses.q34: How often do you get lost or forget which way to go while driving?
lapses.q35: How often do you forget where you parked your car?

habits.title: Driving Habits
habits.q36: How often do you forget to signal when changing lanes or turning?
habits.q37: How often do you forget to check your mirrors or blind spots before changing lanes?
habits.q38: How often do you become distracted (by something like a phone or music) and then miss something happening on the road?
habits.q39: How often do you start driving without fastening your seatbelt and realize it soon after?
habits.q40: How often do you find yourself multitasking (like adjusting the radio or grabbing something) and briefly drifting out of your lane?

quizExplanationResult.heading: Driving profile result
quizExplanationResult.emptyRiskFactors: Risk-increasing factors will appear here as the explanation streams.
quizExplanationResult.emptyProtectiveFactors: Protective factors will appear here as the explanation streams.
quizExplanationResult.emptyAdvice: Practical advice will appear here as the explanation streams.
quizExplanationResult.disclaimerFallback: This explanation is for driving-safety education and does not change the computed score.

instruction.keepRight: Keep right toward Boulevard Krim Belkacem
instruction.continueStraight: Then continue straight past the next junction

routePanel.whyThisRouteText: Balanced travel time with fewer high-risk segments than the fastest option, while keeping the route direct enough for active guidance.

default.label: Default state (balanced route, moderate risk)
default.summary: SIARA recommends this route because it avoids 2 high-risk accident clusters and has 32% lower predicted risk than the fastest route. It adds 4 minutes but skips a high-severity area near the destination.
default.details:
Risk model: SIARA v2 (gradient-boosted)
Sampled 12 points along route
Heatmap clusters within 200m: 2
Reports within 500m last 7d: 3 (2 police-verified)
Weather: clear, visibility good
Time-of-day adjustment: +5% (evening rush)

highRisk.label: High-risk warning state (fastest route, high risk)
highRisk.summary: The fastest route crosses 3 high-risk accident clusters. Consider the safer alternative — it adds 6 minutes but cuts predicted risk by more than half.

h1.label: 3 high-risk clusters on route
h1.detail: Bab Ezzouar, El Harrach, RN5 km 18

h3.label: 2 dangerous segments traversed
h3.detail: Both flagged as high-severity in last 30 days

error.label: Error state
error.errorMessage: Could not generate an explanation. Showing risk numbers only.

r1.label: Avoids 2 high-risk accident clusters
r1.detail: Bab Ezzouar junction & RN24 km 12 (18 reports last 30 days)

r2.label: 1 high-risk road segment skipped
r2.detail: Steep curve on RN5 with 4 severe reports

aboutPage.title: About SIARA
aboutPage.intro: SIARA is a smart road safety platform that combines reports, maps, and AI to support safer mobility and faster incident response.

realtime.title: Real-time coordination
realtime.desc: Live map intelligence for field teams and road users.

ai.title: AI-assisted prioritization
ai.desc: Severity and reliability scoring for better response decisions.

visibility.title: Operational visibility
visibility.desc: Unified alerts, reports, and analytics in one SIARA workspace.

overview.title: What is SIARA
overview.desc: SIARA centralizes incident reporting, monitoring, and operational visibility in one unified platform.

mission.title: Mission
mission.desc: Improve road safety and incident response with accurate, timely, and actionable information.

vision.title: Vision
vision.desc: Support smart city integration using AI and connected data for proactive public safety.

impact.title: How SIARA Creates Impact
impact.lead: SIARA is built to turn fragmented incident data into coordinated action. Instead of relying on isolated reports, it connects citizens, responders, and supervisors through one decision-ready platform.

capture.title: 1. Capture
capture.desc: Citizens submit incidents with location, media, and context from the field.

analyze.title: 2. Analyze
analyze.desc: AI models classify risk, detect anomalies, and rank urgency for operators.

act.title: 3. Act
act.desc: Police and teams validate events, trigger alerts, and coordinate interventions quickly.

riskMapping.title: Risk Mapping
riskMapping.desc: Visualize dangerous corridors and hotspot zones with incident density and severity layers.

alertEngine.title: Alert Engine
alertEngine.desc: Generate targeted alerts by location, incident type, and priority level in real time.

analytics.title: Operational Analytics
analytics.desc: Track trends, response performance, and verification throughput across the network.

coordination.title: Cross-Team Coordination
coordination.desc: Support consistent decision-making between field agents, dispatch, and supervisors.

descriptionPage.title: Platform Description
descriptionPage.intro: SIARA is an operational intelligence platform for road safety. It converts incident data into structured decisions, enabling faster coordination and more consistent field response.

overview.title: Overview
overview.body: The platform combines citizen reporting, geospatial context, and AI-assisted evaluation to improve situational awareness across road safety operations.

clarity.heading: Operational clarity
clarity.detail: One shared view of incidents, priorities, and response status.

response.heading: Faster response cycles
response.detail: Clear prioritization reduces delay between detection and action.

decision.heading: Consistent decision support
decision.detail: Standardized scoring helps teams align on urgency and next steps.

workflow.title: Service Workflow
workflow.lead: A transparent end-to-end process from intake to validated communication.

intake.title: Incident Intake
intake.detail: Reports are captured with location, media, and contextual metadata from users and operators.

validation.title: Data Validation
validation.detail: Input quality checks standardize records and prepare events for downstream analysis.

riskAssessment.title: Risk Assessment
riskAssessment.detail: Scoring models estimate urgency and confidence to support prioritization decisions.

operationalReview.title: Operational Review
operationalReview.detail: Authorized teams verify incidents and assign the appropriate response workflow.

alertDistribution.title: Alert Distribution
alertDistribution.detail: Validated alerts are distributed to relevant users, zones, and operational channels.

tech.title: Technology and Governance
tech.lead: SIARA balances intelligent automation with human validation to maintain reliability and accountability.

contactPage.title: Contact
contactPage.intro: Reach out to SIARA for support, questions, or partnership opportunities.

hero.title: Make roads safer
hero.subtitle: Analyze, predict and prevent accidents before they happen.

step01.label: Step 01
step01.title: Data Collection
step01.description: Aggregated road data, accident history, weather and traffic density.

step02.label: Step 02
step02.title: Analysis & Predictive AI
step02.description: Machine learning models to estimate risk zones in real time.

step03.label: Step 03
step03.title: Real-Time Alerts
step03.description: Notifications and visualizations to anticipate and prevent accidents.

mission.title: Zero preventable accidents.
mission.description: Significantly reduce road accidents by putting the power of AI and data at the service of drivers, authorities and smart infrastructure developers.

analytics.title: Analytics Dashboard
analytics.description: Aggregated visualizations, time trends and dynamic filters to understand risk evolution.

mapping.title: Prediction Map
mapping.description: Interactive map highlighting risk areas at the local level with real-time incident overlays.

mobile.title: SIARA Mobile App
mobile.description: On-board alerts, risk notifications and preventive guidance at your fingertips.

join.title: Join the Initiative
join.description: Collaborate to make Algerian roads safer through data and artificial intelligence.

predictionsPage.profileBio: Browse live road reports and share updates from the field.

hero.title: Advanced
hero.subtitle: Harness the power of our machine-learning-based predictive engine to anticipate risk zones, analyze temporal trends, and make informed decisions in real time.

heatmaps.title: Heat Maps
heatmaps.description: Visualization of accident density zones with dynamic risk layer overlay across 48 provinces.

timeSeries.title: Time Series
timeSeries.description: Predictive analysis by time slot and seasonality with LSTM and LightGBM models trained on 5 years of data.

export.title: Export & Reports
export.description: Automatic generation of PDF reports and CSV/GeoJSON export for authorities and researchers.

viz.title: Predictive Overview — Risk Distribution by Zone
viz.overlaySub: The model is being calibrated on your regional data

step1.title: Data Collection
step1.description: Citizen reports, ONM weather sensors, DGSN historical data (5 years), and real-time DGRSDT traffic flow combined in a unified pipeline.

step2.title: Feature Engineering
step2.description: Extraction of 120+ variables: weather conditions, road density, hour/day/season, proximity to schools/hospitals, history by zone.

step3.title: Predictive Model
step3.description: LightGBM + CatBoost ensemble with temporal cross-validation. Risk score 0–100 generated by geographic zone and time slot.

step4.title: Smart Alerts
step4.description: Proactive push notifications sent to users before entering a high-risk zone, with suggested alternate route.

cta.title: Early Access
cta.description: Be among the first to test real-time predictions on your daily route.

predictiveAlerts.title: Predictive Alerts
predictiveAlerts.alert1: • Risk peak expected at 5 PM – Algiers Centre
